items.prompt: Does the facility rely on electric power for core operations?
items.prompt_norm: does the facility rely on electric power for core operations

items.prompt_norm: who provides electric power to the facilitysite

items.prompt_norm: if electric supply is lost without backup how soon would the facility be severely impacted hours

items.prompt_norm: once electric supply is lost without backup what percentage of normal business functions are lost or degraded

items.prompt_norm: is any backup or alternate power capability available for this infrastructure

items.prompt_norm: how many hours can backup power sustain operations without refueling

items.prompt_norm: once external service is restored how long until full resumption of operations hours
